svg.title: Complete Weekly Event Timeline v2 — REWARD SCHEME CORE ENGINE v2.0
svg.desc: Full weekly event flow with corrected T-0H 3-phase execution order: Compute All Draws → Reveal All Winners → Exit Processing
svg.text: COMPLETE WEEKLY EVENT TIMELINE — REWARD SCHEME CORE ENGINE v2.0 [v2 — CORRECTED T-0H ORDER]
All timing points configurable in System Settings → Draw Calendar section | 24x7 member joining always open | Winners revealed ONLY at T-0H
New member registers → DEP token burned (mandatory check) → WL number assigned (FIFO by join datetime) → awaits pool placement
MON→THU: Payment window open | ₹50/day late fee accrual
Winners stay in pool — NOT revealed
No exits, no tokens — SELECTION ONLY
No winner revealed before all draws complete
ALL 12-member pools MUST draw — no skip
→ FIFO oldest pool first fills vacancies
SDE flags cleared | draw lock released
SYSTEM SETTINGS → DRAW CALENDAR SECTION (all configurable)
All times computed relative to T-00. ChronosEngine patches datetime.now() system-wide during simulation for time-travel testing.
A: Paid on time → Active, draw eligible
B: Late fee paid in grace → seat saved, grace_fee_paid=True
C: Grace expired + unpaid → Eliminated at G+05M, DEP forfeited
Only PAID members advance +1 level after draw. Unpaid survivors who are not eliminated do NOT advance level.
BUG FIX 1: WIT tokens were shown BEFORE winners revealed (wrong). Corrected: WIT tokens issued in Phase 3 (EXIT PROCESSING), AFTER Phase 2 (REVEAL).

BUG FIX 2: Regular draws were shown AFTER winners revealed (wrong). Corrected: regular draws execute in Phase 1 (COMPUTE) alongside Ext-III/Ext-II/SDE — ALL draws complete BEFORE ANY winner is revealed.

KEY GUARANTEES: ALL active pools with exactly 12 members MUST draw every week (no skip) | Winners revealed ONLY at T-0H Phase 2 | WIT tokens issued ONLY AFTER reveal | All draws computed BEFORE any reveal
REWARD SCHEME CORE ENGINE v2.0 | Weekly Event Timeline v2 | Session: Soheb Khan User 2 / Sohebkhan.sk11 | 2026-06-14
